jobs.title: Fucking Engineer
jobs.description: Nexus Systems is seeking a skilled DevOps Engineer to strengthen our infrastructure and reliability practices. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, automating deployment workflows, and managing cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP. Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and orchestration platforms like Kubernetes is required. You will monitor system health using tools like Grafana and Prometheus, respond to incidents, perform root cause analysis, and implement preventive measures. You will work closely with software development teams to integrate DevOps best practices into the SDLC, including infrastructure as code using Terraform and Ansible. Security hardening, cost optimization, and capacity planning are also key parts of this role. We are looking for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments and is passionate about building resilient, scalable, and efficient systems.

jobs.title: Java Developer
jobs.description: This job requires experience in developing software using spring boot for the backend and angular for the frontend , docker , azure for cloud services.
